title: mentha gentilis var. stricta
intro: Mentha gentilis var. stricta, also known as strict water mint or wild mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is characterized by its distinctive, upright growth habit and fragrant leaves, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Mentha gentilis var. stricta include alleviating digestive issues, reducing fever, and easing respiratory problems, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Mentha gentilis var. stricta include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
